executives.name: Harry Barr
executives.background: Mr. Barr has been the Chairman and CEO of the Company since its inception. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry and has guided several companies from inception to production.

executives.name: Cody Mullens
executives.background: Mr. Mullens is a CPA with experience in financial reporting and auditing for public companies in the resource sector.

executives.name: Aliya Barr
executives.background: Ms. Barr has over 10 years of experience in corporate communications and investor relations within the mining sector.

executives.name: Colin Bowdidge
executives.background: Dr. Bowdidge is a professional geologist with over 50 years of experience in mineral exploration and management.

executives.name: John Londry
executives.background: Mr. Londry is a professional geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles with major mining companies.

executives.name: Ron Stewart
executives.background: Mr. Stewart is a mining professional with over 30 years of experience in exploration, project development, and capital markets.

executives.name: Pete Dasler
executives.background: Mr. Dasler is a Professional Geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mineral exploration and mining industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public mining companies and was the President and CEO of Canex Metals Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Harry Barr
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of New Age Metals Inc. with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Colin Bowdidge
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Bowdidge is a professional geologist with over 50 years of experience in mineral exploration and management.

board_of_directors.name: John Londry
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Londry is a professional geologist with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles with major mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Ron Stewart
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Stewart is a mining professional with over 30 years of experience in exploration, project development, and capital markets.
